_comment: INEGI authoritative establecimiento counts per entidad. Source: BuscarEntidad API response counts from the 2026-05-03 national pipeline extraction (what INEGI returns when queried per state). Cross-verified for entidad 06 (Colima) and 29 (Tlaxcala) against manual lookups at https://www.inegi.org.mx/app/mapa/denue/ — exact match. Never fill from training data — the API exposes no version metadata. Re-run the pipeline if INEGI publishes a new snapshot.
_source: data/state/pipeline-state.json (national pipeline run 2026-05-03; cross-verified manually for ent 06 + 29 at https://www.inegi.org.mx/app/mapa/denue/)
